name: The Precursor Rim
description: Your survey fleet has found a dormant precursor megastructure at the edge of known space, and every choice trades fleet strength, credits, alien goodwill, and forbidden knowledge on the road to controlling it.

cards.prompt: Survey Ship Meridian pings home: a dormant precursor megastructure drifts at the rim, its hull older than your empire's charters. How do you claim it?

leftChoice.text: Commit a war fleet to secure the site

rightChoice.text: Slip in a small science team quietly

cards.prompt: Your science officer warns that the structure's fields spike when probed too hard, frying instruments and crew alike.

leftChoice.text: Heed her caution and advance slowly

rightChoice.text: Push hard for data now

cards.prompt: House Varrus, an ambitious rival, declares the megastructure lies within their trade sphere and demands you withdraw.

rightChoice.text: Share findings to buy their peace

cards.prompt: Deck crews whisper of mutiny; wages are late and the structure terrifies them. The tension could snap at any moment.

rightChoice.text: Negotiate and back-pay the crew

cards.prompt: An envoy of the 699 Concordance arrives, robes glittering. They name the megastructure sacred ground of their ancestors.

leftChoice.text: Vow to respect their holy site

rightChoice.text: Dismiss the claim as superstition

cards.prompt: A mercenary flotilla offers its guns to guard the expedition — for a princely fee.

rightChoice.text: Decline and rely on your own ships

cards.prompt: The structure yawns open a docking maw. Your crews debate whether to enter its ancient throat.

rightChoice.text: Send only remote probes

cards.prompt: House Varrus and the Concordance both demand you arbitrate who may set foot on the megastructure first.

leftChoice.text: Rule in favor of House Varrus

rightChoice.text: Rule in favor of the Concordance

cards.prompt: The Merchant Guild offers a vast loan to sustain the strained expedition — with strings attached.

rightChoice.text: Refuse and levy new colony taxes

cards.prompt: Raiders drawn by rumors of precursor tech ambush your supply lanes.

rightChoice.text: Pay them to disappear

cards.prompt: Codebreakers decode a fragment: a star-map of precursor waystations. Its value is immense — and dangerous.

leftChoice.text: Publish the map to all the galaxy

rightChoice.text: Seal it for military eyes only

cards.prompt: Grand Admiral Kesh insists the megastructure be reforged into the ultimate weapon before rivals do the same.

rightChoice.text: Forbid it as too reckless

cards.prompt: An intelligence officer brings evidence that saboteurs have infiltrated the expedition's inner circle.

rightChoice.text: Feed them false data instead

cards.prompt: A drifting colony of refugees begs sanctuary aboard your growing rim stations.

rightChoice.text: Turn them away to protect security

cards.prompt: The megastructure's core hums to life on your command. Full activation could reveal everything — or shatter it.

rightChoice.text: Attempt a cautious partial activation

cards.prompt: Sabotage detonates in the reactor bays; systems flicker as blame flies across the command deck.

rightChoice.text: Rush emergency repairs

cards.prompt: Chief Researcher Ilun pleads for one last funding surge to translate the precursor command lexicon.

rightChoice.text: Divert the credits to the war fleet

cards.prompt: The command lexicon is deciphered. The megastructure awaits a master — step to the control altar, or turn back.

rightChoice.text: Hesitate and order a retreat

cards.prompt: Overloaded and abandoned, the megastructure convulses and collapses into a searing nova, taking your rim fleet and reputation with it. The dream of the precursors dies in fire.

leftChoice.text: Mourn the fallen and rebuild from ashes

rightChoice.text: Accept the ruin of your ambition

cards.prompt: The precursor megastructure answers your hand, its ancient light bathing your throne. Houses bow, the Concordance kneels in awe, and the Imperium enters a golden age at the rim of the galaxy.

leftChoice.text: Rule wisely as steward of the precursors

rightChoice.text: Wield its power to reshape known space
